description: Taking traditional designs and giving it modern twist is what makes ice watches irreplacable timepieces. The Love wrist watch is no exception. Contemporary and trendy, it& rsquo s an affordable timepiece, with an exquisite design that highlights your individuality.Case diameter: 35 mmCase thickness: 10 mmDial shape: RoundWarranty: 2 yearsSolid plastic case with fixed bezel for added durability, style and comfortIce logo on the 12 hour markBlue plastic strap with a butterfly clasp for comfortBlue dial with button to reset time and alarmSolid case back made of stainless steel for enhanced durabilityWater resistance up to 50 meters, allowing you to use it even when showering
